---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this co-processor
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm trying to calculate NTC thermistor temperature, and it requires too many floating-point calculations on the master..."

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Keep in mind the strict memory constraints of the CH32V003 (16KB Flash, 2KB RAM).

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or diagrams about the feature request here.
